Milkshake Mania Wiki
Play
Wiki / Contracts

Catering contracts

Contracts are timed catering orders: blend a target number of shakes before the deadline for a cash + XP payout. They're a great burst of income for active play.

How they work

The order system

Blend manually

Contracts track your manual blends — keep clicking to fill the order before time runs out.

Up to 3 at once

New contracts appear periodically (you'll want to be around Level 8+), and you can juggle up to three active at a time.

Income-scaled reward

The cash payout scales with the target size, the contract's reward factor, and your current income — so contracts stay relevant as you grow.

Catering Expertise

Operations research boosts contract payouts by +15% / +30% / +50%.

Reference

All 6 contracts

"Reward ×" is the factor that multiplies into the cash payout; "From day" is the earliest in-game day the contract can appear.

ContractTargetReward ×XPTimeFrom day
Birthday Party Catering30×3608 min1
School Fair Booth50×49010 min5
Wedding Reception100×718012 min10
Corporate Event150×822012 min15
Food Festival Booth250×1438015 min20
Stadium Concession400×2055015 min30

Deadlines run on in-game time, not real time. Pair a contract with a power-up and a fast blend setup to clear the big ones comfortably.

GoalsDaily & hourly Power-upsBurst income
